title: arenaria tetraquetra var. nana
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra var. nana, also known as Dwarf Sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arenaria tetraquetra var. nana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Arenaria tetraquetra var. nana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
